title: mentha microphylla var. condensata
intro: Mentha microphylla var. condensata, also known as 'Pennyroyal', is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) native to South America. The medicinal properties of Pennyroyal lie in its essential oil, which contains pulegone, a compound with antispasmodic and insecticidal properties. The health benefits of Pennyroyal include its ability to alleviate menstrual cramps, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural repellent against insects. Herbal preparations of Pennyroyal can be found in teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which are often used to soothe digestive issues and relieve symptoms of menopause.
